<h1>Get Futures Lead Trader Status(TRADE)</h1>
<h2 class="anchor anchorWithStickyNavbar_fMI7" id="api-description">API Description<a class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to API Description" title="Direct link to API Description" href="/docs/copy_trading/future-copy-trading#api-description">​</a></h2>
<p>Get Futures Lead Trader Status</p>

<p><strong>20</strong></p>
